Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.state

Interface ObservableCollectionType<E,C extends Collection<E>,R extends CollectionObservable<E,? super C>>

Type Parameters:
E - the type of elements in the collection
C - the type of the collection used in this collector
R - the type of the resulting observable collection
@AvailableSince("0.0.50") public interface ObservableCollectionType<E,C extends Collection<E>,R extends CollectionObservable<E,? super C>>
ObservableCollectionType is a utility interface for creating and manipulating collections in an observable context. It helps in creating snapshots, initializing collections with specific capacities, and converting standard collections into observable collections.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    R
    asCollectionObservable(CollectionObservable<E,? extends Collection<E>> base)
    Convert the given collection into an observable collection
    C
    collection(int initialCapacity)
    Create a new collection with the given initial capacity
    C
    snapshot(Collection<E> collection)
    Create a snapshot of the given collection
    static <E> ObservableCollectionType<E,? extends List<E>,ListObservable<E>>
    toList()
    Creates a ObservableCollectionType that generates observable lists.
    static <E> ObservableCollectionType<E,? extends List<E>,ListObservable<E>>
    toList(Function<Collection<E>,? extends List<E>> snapshot, IntFunction<? extends List<E>> collection)
    Creates a ObservableCollectionType that generates observable lists.
    static <E> ObservableCollectionType<E,? extends Set<E>,SetObservable<E>>
    toSet()
    Creates a new ObservableCollectionType that uses Set.copyOf(Collection) as the snapshot function and HashSet as the collection function.
    static <E> ObservableCollectionType<E,? extends Set<E>,SetObservable<E>>
    toSet(Function<Collection<E>,? extends Set<E>> snapshot, IntFunction<? extends Set<E>> collection)
    Creates a ObservableCollectionType that generates observable sets.

  • Method Details

    • toSet

      static <E> ObservableCollectionType<E,? extends Set<E>,SetObservable<E>> toSet()
      Creates a new ObservableCollectionType that uses Set.copyOf(Collection) as the snapshot function and HashSet as the collection function.
      Type Parameters:
      E - The type of elements in the collection.
      Returns:
      A new ObservableCollectionType instance.

    • toList

      static <E> ObservableCollectionType<E,? extends List<E>,ListObservable<E>> toList()
      Creates a ObservableCollectionType that generates observable lists. The resulting ListObservable can observe changes to a list collection. This method uses List.copyOf(Collection) as the snapshot function and ArrayList as the collection creation function.
      Type Parameters:
      E - The type of elements in the observable list.
      Returns:
      A ObservableCollectionType configured to produce ListObservable instances.

    • toList

      static <E> ObservableCollectionType<E,? extends List<E>,ListObservable<E>> toList(Function<Collection<E>,? extends List<E>> snapshot, IntFunction<? extends List<E>> collection)
      Creates a ObservableCollectionType that generates observable lists. The resulting ListObservable can observe changes to a list collection. This method allows specifying custom snapshot and collection creation functions.
      Type Parameters:
      E - The type of elements in the observable list.
      Parameters:
      snapshot - A function that takes a Collection of elements and creates a snapshot List.
      collection - A function that takes an integer initial capacity and creates a new mutable List.
      Returns:
      A ObservableCollectionType configured to produce ListObservable instances.

    • toSet

      static <E> ObservableCollectionType<E,? extends Set<E>,SetObservable<E>> toSet(Function<Collection<E>,? extends Set<E>> snapshot, IntFunction<? extends Set<E>> collection)
      Creates a ObservableCollectionType that generates observable sets. The resulting SetObservable can observe changes to a set collection. This method allows specifying custom snapshot and collection creation functions.
      Type Parameters:
      E - The type of elements in the observable set.
      Parameters:
      snapshot - A function that takes a Collection of elements and creates a snapshot Set.
      collection - A function that takes an integer initial capacity and creates a new mutable Set.
      Returns:
      A ObservableCollectionType configured to produce SetObservable instances.

    • snapshot

      C snapshot(Collection<E> collection)
      Create a snapshot of the given collection
      Parameters:
      collection - the collection to snapshot
      Returns:
      a new collection containing the same elements as the given collection

    • collection

      C collection(int initialCapacity)
      Create a new collection with the given initial capacity
      Parameters:
      initialCapacity - the initial capacity of the collection
      Returns:
      a new collection with the given initial capacity

    • asCollectionObservable

      R asCollectionObservable(CollectionObservable<E,? extends Collection<E>> base)
      Convert the given collection into an observable collection
      Parameters:
      base - the collection to convert
      Returns:
      an observable collection containing the same elements as the given collection
